programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: The master of flipping, James Dainard, and longtime rival Jared decide to bury the hatchet and partner on a 100-year-old zombie house trashed by squatters. The property has huge potential, but it's in rough shape and needs a full overhaul-including restoring its original character and finishing the entire basement to push the value well past a million dollars. James has a strict plan to keep the n

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is faced with a big dilemma, do flipping and friendship go together?; his longtime friend Carrie, friend to his wife Clair, has fallen on some tough times and wants James' help; recently divorced and eager for financial freedom, Carrie convinces James she can handle the project even though she is a complete novice; together, they tackle a mid-century modern disaster with an unfinishe

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard's grandparents have recently passed, and together with his mom, Claire, James must help decide the future of the family home. The house is full of memories but also outdated, with a small kitchen and a layout that doesn't showcase its views. Working with his team—construction manager Ryan and designer and realtor Megan—James aims to renovate and restore the home for top dollar.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard has seen it all, but nothing quite like this. Longtime real estate deal-finders Buck and Will want to partner with James and step into the flipping world, but they're total rookies. Clueless about renovation but full of big ideas, they pitch James on a disaster of a house: a damaged roof, a choppy main floor, and a yard and deck that are more jungle than backyard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is faced with a big dilemma, do flip and friendship go together?; his longtime friend Carrie, friend to his wife Clair, has fallen on some tough times and wants James' help; recently divorced and eager for financial freedom, Carrie convinces James she can handle the project even though she is a complete novice; together, they tackle a mid-century modern disaster with an unfinished ba

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders. When Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter. But what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Palm Springs, Calif., in search of higher-end goods; Kenny tries to amp up the profit on an otherwise unimpressive unit; Rene sees quick potential where others don't; Brandi and Bozek try to keep their gains from squirming away.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: An expensive jewelry box in discovered among the treasures in Huntington Beach, Calif.; Darrell attempts to reel in a unit; Barry eyes military antiques.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey display their confidence by arriving with a caravan of trucks; Darrell hopes to distract his competitors with doughnuts; Jarrod and Brandi plan an anniversary party for their store.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene's superstitious attitude could prove to be a hindrance; Ivy trusts his gut; Jarrod and Brandi manage to get the last laugh on their rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In West Covina, Brandi makes a serious land grab, and it pays off handsomely; Rene can't resist the mystery of a good safe; Kenny can't seem to satisfy his hunger; Barry takes an opportunity to poach from the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers travel to El Monte, Calif.; Darrell and Brandon locate antiques; Jarrod and Brandi find a locker; Ivy scores big.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Laura takes over as auctioneer when Dan calls in sick; Barry uncovers a "knock out" unit; Jarrod finds a locker with "gangsta" flavor; Darrell discovers a classic movie prop.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon need to secure merchandise for their Website; an exhausted Ivy switches into robot mode; Rene dresses for success; Jarrod and Brandi try a new strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Lord of Lancaster asserts his reign by levying tariffs on the little people; Lisa & Kerri stitch together some antique accoutrements; Dusty & Lupe spot some gold in an immense locker; Kenny finally finds himself some decent profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes an opportunity to practice his dart game as the buyers head to Riverside; Rene exchanges poker for a chance to get his Becker on; Brandi ropes in more than she bargained for, but a surprise shows up.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers have their worlds rocked in Garden Grove; Ivy learns that there are surprising uses for office equipment; Lisa finds the shiniest bowl she's ever seen; Dusty, getting a rise out of everyone, finds out the true meaning of being a jerk.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny channels an old friend's tactics, allowing him to pick just the right unit; Brandi flexes her muscles on a dusty locker; Ivy does his best to look beneath the surface, while Rene and Casey gamble big on an even bigger room.
